sentences.arabic: قَبْلَ سَفَرِي اشْتَرَيْتُ وَثِيقَةَ تَأْمِينٍ لِلسَّفَرِ.
sentences.translation: Prije putovanja kupio sam putno osiguranje.
sentences.translationEn: Before my trip I bought travel insurance.

sentences.arabic: تَغْطِّي الْوَثِيقَةُ تَكَالِيفَ الطَّوَارِئِ الطِّبِّيَّةِ وَإِلْغَاءَ الرَّحْلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Polica pokriva troškove hitne medicinske pomoći i otkazivanje putovanja.
sentences.translationEn: The policy covers emergency medical costs and trip cancellation.

sentences.arabic: اتَّصَلْتُ بِشَرِكَةِ التَّأْمِينِ لِأَفْهَمَ الشُّرُوطَ جَيِّدًا.
sentences.translation: Nazvao sam osiguravajuće društvo da dobro razumijem uvjete.
sentences.translationEn: I called the insurance company to understand the terms properly.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ لِيَ الْمُوَظَّفُ أَنَّ التَّأْمِينَ يَشْمَلُ فَقْدَانَ الْأَمْتِعَةِ أَيْضًا.
sentences.translation: Službenik mi je potvrdio da osiguranje pokriva i gubitak prtljage.
sentences.translationEn: The agent confirmed that the insurance also covers lost luggage.

sentences.arabic: حَفِظْتُ رَقَمَ الطَّوَارِئِ فِي هَاتِفِي قَبْلَ مُغَادَرَةِ الْمَطَارِ.
sentences.translation: Pohranio sam broj za hitne slučajeve u mobitel prije nego što sam napustio aerodrom.
sentences.translationEn: I saved the emergency number in my phone before leaving the airport.
